query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "transitlm: a large-scale dataset and benchmark for map-free transit ro" linguistics
rationale: The paper investigates LLM personality consistency and self-knowledge, which is a distinct construct from the user's question regarding map-free transit routing datasets and benchmarks. It fails all inclusion criteria (a-f) as it does not measure transit mechanisms, use transit data, or provide foundational methodology for the specific domain of map-free navigation, representing an off-domain topic despite sharing the general "LLM" keyword.
